title: symphyopappus myricifolius
intro: Symphyopappus myricifolius, also known as the myrtle-leaved bur marigold, is a plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Symphyopappus myricifolius include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce pain and inflammation, and aid in respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to create teas, salves, and other remedies.
